# build { #snippet_cast.screencast.build }

```python
snippet_cast.screencast.build(
    source_path,
    out_path,
    tts,
    trace=True,
    every=False,
    subtitles=False,
    typing=False,
)
```

Render an annotated Python snippet into a narrated screencast video.

Parses `source_path` for trailing ``#:`` narration comments, optionally
executes it to capture a per-line variable state, and assembles one
still-frame-plus-narration clip per beat into `out_path` with ffmpeg.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**source_path**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Path to the annotated, still-valid Python snippet to narrate.

<code>[**out_path**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Path the assembled MP4 is written to.

<code>[**tts**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Name of a registered TTS backend (a key of `BACKENDS`): one of `"say"`, `"silent"`, `"piper"`, `"elevenlabs"`.

<code>[**trace**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [True]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Execute the snippet under `sys.settrace` to capture the state panel. Required for `every=True`.

<code>[**every**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [False]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Emit one beat per *execution* of a marked line (animates loops iteration by iteration) instead of one beat per marked line.

<code>[**subtitles**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [False]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Burn the narration text onto each frame as a caption.

<code>[**typing**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [False]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Type newly revealed lines character-by-character (first-execution mode only; has no effect when `every=True`).

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
from snippet_cast import build

build("fib.py", "out.mp4", tts="silent", subtitles=True)
```

## See Also {.doc-section .doc-section-see-also}

[](`snippet_cast.screencast.main`)
